mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that reduces discount rates for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 330 in CPIAUCSL triggers central bank rate hikes, compressing equity earnings multiples and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite inflationary signals, or Rank IC > 0.05 in inflation-sensitive periods.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL indicate tightening monetary policy amid inflation, creating headwinds for equity markets and generating negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction effect reverses direction in 40%+ of triggered cases, or joint signal fails to explain > 15% of return variance in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in UNRATE below 4.0% signals tightening labor markets, boosting corporate profits through wage growth and generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in 50%+ of low UNRATE regimes, or wage growth fails to correlate with earnings surprises in 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO) indicates robust supply-side growth, reducing input costs and improving corporate margins, which drives positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns show negative correlation with INDPRO in 3-year rolling windows, or momentum effects reverse in 40%+ of high INDPRO periods.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating housing starts (HOUST) reflect strong demand for residential construction, boosting related sectors and generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX fails to outperform baseline in 60%+ of high HOUST periods, or housing data shows weak linkage to sector-specific returns in 2-year backtests.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDP (GDPC1) and residential sales (RSAFS) signals broad-based demand expansion, driving corporate revenue growth and generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction effect breaks down in 35%+ of cases, or combined signal explains < 10% of return variance in 3-year out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth (PAYEMS) above 150k indicates labor market resilience, supporting consumer spending and generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX shows negative 5d returns in 50%+ of high PAYEMS periods, or employment data fails to correlate with consumer discretionary sector performance in 2-year rolling windows.
